data.title: Marvell Debuts Game-Changing LPO Chipset For Data Centers: Details
data.description: Marvell introduces 1.6 Tbps LPO chipset to enable high-bandwidth, short-reach compute fabric connections.

data.title: Tesla's Autopilot Hardware Director Zheng Gao Leaves EV Giant To Join Amazon's Zoox
data.description: Zheng Gao, former Director of Engineering, Autopilot Hardware and Product Design-Electronics at EV giant Tesla, has joined Amazon's robotaxi unit Zoox.

data.title: US Futures Mixed As Street Brace For Inflation Data: Analyst Says 2024 Will Go Down As The 'Best Election Year Return Ever'
data.description: U.S. futures were mixed on Wednesday in premarket hours ahead of the crucial inflation data.

data.title: SMCI Stock Drops In Pre-Market Despite Super Micro CEO's Assurance Against Delisting: What's Going On?
data.description: The server manufacturer had previously benefited from the surge in demand for AI infrastructure, but its shares were affected by an auditing scandal.

data.title: Asia And Europe Markets Mixed; Crude Oil Up Amid China Stimulus Hope, Dollar Strengthens - Global Markets Today While US Slept
data.description: On Tues, U.S. markets closed lower, with tech losses outweighing gains in communications. Investors cautious ahead of key inflation data. Labor productivity rose by 2.2% in Q3. Most S&P sectors fell, led by real estate, tech, and materials. Asia markets mixed, with Japan and India up, and China and Hong Kong down. Eurozone down slightly, commodities mostly up, and U.S. futures mixed. U.S. dollar strengthened.
